title: Mothers Wax
summary:
thumb|300px|Right|Mothers Wax Blister Card
Special Mothers Wax Promotions Started in 2003 and ran into 2004. Cars came with special Hot Wheels Wax from Mothers. Carson Lev put this program together and Chip Foose designed graphics for many of the early models.

title: Syd Mead's Sentinel 400 Limo
summary: Not second edition, 2004 camouflage series.

title: 22nd Annual Hot Wheels Collectors Nationals
summary: The 22nd Annual Hot Wheels Collectors Nationals took place on March 23–27, 2022 in Charlotte, North Carolina. The guest of honor at the Nationals was Julian Koiles.

title: 100% Preferred
summary:
200px|right
The 100% Preferred line was produced in 2003. It was originally referred to as the Preferred line, but has over time become the 100% Preferred. Contrary to the title, most of the castings were from the basic line, but does include several from the 100% line.

title: Hot Wheels id (app)
summary: Hot Wheels id was a freemium mobile game developed by Mattel and released on the Apple App Store and Google Play Store in July 2019 as a companion app to the Hot Wheels id line.

title: Mario Kart
summary:
200px|right
The Mario Kart series features a variety of Super Mario characters in a variety of karts, with plastic driver figures. Playsets that mimic the video game tracks are also available, as well as 4-packs and a glider series.

title: Fiat 642 RN2 Bartoletti Transporter
summary: There are a few other castings which use Phillips-head screws instead of rivets.

title: VW Bug
summary: International cards VOLKSWAGEN (97) 5sp NoLogo & VW BUG (98)

title: Hot Wheels id
summary: thumb|The Hot Wheels id logo|226x226pxThe Hot Wheels id Series features cars embedded with NFC microchips that originally combined with apps and customizable Smart Track sets to play a multitude of games. The id Race Portal paired with the app recorded progress for each car. The portal also connects to regular Hot Wheels track.

title: Team Hot Wheels Top Rides Series (2012)
summary: The Team Hot Wheels Top Rides Series was released exclusively at Target stores in 2012. All castings in this series are all 2011 and 2012 mainline releases on a specially designed card by the picks of the four driver teams. Each vehicle comes with a sticker sheet consisting of the Team Hot Wheels logo and the team color icon.
